# {project_name}

{goal}

## Stack
- Python 3.12
- FastAPI 0.115+
- SQLAlchemy 2.0
- pytest + httpx for tests
- ruff for lint

## Quick start

```bash
python3 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
pip install -e .[dev]

uvicorn src.main:app --reload
# open http://127.0.0.1:8000/health
```

## Test
```bash
pytest -q
```

## Lint
```bash
ruff check src tests
```
